contract_traceability: Implementation read from: coder/model.py, backbone.py, head.py, frontend.py, layers.py

baseline_status.notes: Configurable via stem_type='patchify' in femto_s(); no training results

baseline_status.baseline: ConvNeXt V2 Femto (spectrogram stem, square 7x7 kernels)
baseline_status.notes: Configurable via stage_kernel_sizes override; covered by Ablation A
External implementation not provided; would need separate reproduction

grounded: ConvNeXt V2 provides a clean scaling family from 3.7M to 660M params
Rectangular kernels improve ESC-50 accuracy at small scale (Chang et al. 2026)
GRN prevents feature collapse in ConvNeXt V2 on ImageNet
All 5 model variants instantiate and produce correct output shapes
All 5 variants have monotonic parameter counts within 15% of targets
hypothesis: Rectangular (7,5) kernels benefit at all scales (5M-30M) — Ablation A configured but untrained
GRN transfers to spectrogram domain — Ablation B configured but untrained
Pure CNN matches attention-based methods on ESC-50 — no comparison results yet
10M variant (Femto-S) achieves >=93% on ESC-50 without pretraining — no training results
30M variant (Tiny-S) achieves >=94% on ESC-50 without pretraining — no training results
Spectrogram stem outperforms patchify stem — Ablation C configured but untrained
TODO_unverified: FCMAE pretraining benefit on audio spectrograms (out of scope for supervised-only design)
Optimal channel allocation differs from ImageNet domain
Whether Tiny-S (30M) avoids overfitting on 2000-clip ESC-50 dataset
All accuracy claims (no training pipeline available)
All baseline comparisons (no baseline implementations available)
FLOP estimates (2x/6x params) — actual measured FLOPs not reported

evidence: Systematic modern CNN family scaling on ESC-50 across 5M-30M identified as genuine gap
Rectangular kernel scaling behavior at >2M params unstudied in literature
GRN transfer from ImageNet to spectrograms novel (no prior work)
5 cleanly scaled variants with spectrogram adaptations not previously released as a family
concerns: TODO: unverified — literature coverage limited by available sources (level_1 task)
GRN + FCMAE co-design suggests GRN may be less beneficial in supervised-only setting

evidence: All 5 variants have shape, gradient, and numerical stability tests
6 ablations defined as single-field config changes
Ablation runner supports dry-run and training-aware modes
Profiling script covers forward and train modes, all variants
Parameter count verification within 15% tolerance
Gradient checkpointing correctness verified
concerns: No training pipeline — ablations cannot produce metric deltas
No ESC-50 data loading or 5-fold CV implementation
No baseline reproduction code
No McNemar's test implementation
No learning curves or validation metrics

evidence: 10 design decisions with evidence status (grounded/hypothesis) in architecture doc
Spectrogram aspect ratio argument for rectangular kernels (1.49:1)
Frequency-axis information density asymmetry justified
ConvNeXt V2 block design grounded in established literature
concerns: FLOP estimates use heuristic (2x/6x params) rather than measured values
No formal receptive field analysis
No analysis of asymmetric stride effect on effective RF aspect ratio
Frequency-axis discriminative claim asserted without formal citation

evidence: Parameter counts verified for all 5 variants (smoke test)
Monotonic parameter scaling confirmed across variants
Profiling provides throughput and memory estimates
All variants produce correct output shapes at multiple input resolutions
concerns: No accuracy results — central hypothesis unverifiable
No learning curves or convergence analysis
No confusion matrices or per-class metrics
No overfitting analysis (train/val gap)
No baseline comparison results
No scaling law analysis (params vs accuracy)

evidence: Complete PyTorch implementation, 6 source files
Config dataclass with all hyperparameters, no magic numbers
5 variants precisely specified with convenience constructors
AudioFrontend for reproducible spectrogram extraction
Preprocessing/augmentation/training configs fully specified
Gradient checkpointing implemented and tested
Device-portable (CUDA, MPS, CPU)
concerns: No training script (train.py) — most critical reproducibility gap
No ESC-50 data loader
No setup.py or requirements.txt
No fixed random seed for reproducibility of stochastic operations
No checkpoint save/load utilities

evidence: Comprehensive research synthesis document (landscape, gaps, hypothesis, falsification)
Detailed architecture blueprint with pseudocode, ASCII diagram, traceability table
Code with complete docstrings, type annotations, shape comments
Ablation catalogue with expected deltas and failure routing
README with quick-start example
concerns: No paper draft or results section
No publication-quality figures
No ablation tables with actual numbers
ESC-50 dataset description minimal
No SOTA comparison table with results

blocking_gaps.description: No training pipeline exists. The central hypothesis (>=93% at 10M) cannot be evaluated without train.py and ESC-50 data loading.
No baseline implementations (ITFA-DNN, ResNet-50, MobileNetV2) provided. Cannot claim SOTA without comparison.
All 6 ablations are configured but cannot produce metric deltas without training pipeline.
5-fold CV, McNemar's test, learning curves, confusion matrix not implemented.
All accuracy-related claims (>=93%, >=94%, rectangular kernel benefit, GRN benefit) are unverified without training results.
Literature coverage limited to available sources (level_1 task). Full novelty claim requires broader literature review.

recommended_next_experiments.experiment: Implement train.py with ESC-50 data loading, 5-fold CV, SpecAugment, Mixup, logging
recommended_next_experiments.expected_outcome: Accuracy results for all 5 variants under standardized protocol

recommended_next_experiments.experiment: Execute all 6 ablations with training on Femto-S (10M) scale
recommended_next_experiments.expected_outcome: Metric deltas for rectangular kernel, GRN, stem type, SpecAugment, DropPath, Stage 4 kernel

recommended_next_experiments.experiment: Reproduce ITFA-DNN and ResNet-50 baselines with identical training pipeline
recommended_next_experiments.expected_outcome: Direct comparison of SpectroConvNeXt vs established methods at equivalent parameter counts

recommended_next_experiments.experiment: Profile on A100 with torch.compile for all 5 variants
recommended_next_experiments.expected_outcome: Measured throughput, memory, FLOPs; validate FLOP estimates

recommended_next_experiments.experiment: Train/val gap analysis: monitor overfitting as function of model size
recommended_next_experiments.expected_outcome: Determine whether Tiny-S (30M) overfits on 2000-clip ESC-50; falsification of scaling ceiling hypothesis
